headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings and news on high-yielding utility stocks.
